decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28 for the carbyne tier; the house code and rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: quote wraps the field in double quotes if it contains a comma, a double-quote, OR a newline (\n or \r); and when quoting, any embedded double-quote is escaped by DOUBLING it (" -> ""). Fields needing none of this are returned unchanged.
The change modifies only the module and adds no dependency.

weighted.criterion: It triggers quoting on newlines as well as commas and quotes, and doubles embedded quotes (not just wrapping, and not only checking for a comma).
